mapper.select: SELECT PSM.popup_sys_seq, PSM.popup_seq, PSM.sys_id, PSM.sys_nm, PSM.begin_dt, PSM.end_dt, PSM.begin_time, PSM.end_time, PSM.use_yn, PSM.sort_order FROM TB_POPUP_SYS_MAP PSM WHERE PSM.popup_seq = #{popupSeq} ORDER BY PSM.sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_POPUP_INFO ( popup_title, popup_type, display_type, image_path, image_nm, popup_width, popup_height, pos_left, pos_top, link_url, new_window_yn, popup_template, close_btn_yn, file_id, image_id, popup_content, all_yn, hide_yn ) VALUES ( #{popupTitle}, #{popupType}, #{displayType}, #{imagePath}, #{imageNm}, #{popupWidth}, #{popupHeight}, #{posLeft}, #{posTop}, #{linkUrl}, #{newWindowYn}, #{popupTemplate}, #{closeBtnYn}, #{fileId}, #{imageId}, #{popupContent}, #{allYn}, #{hideYn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_POPUP_INFO SET popup_title = #{popupTitle}, popup_type = #{popupType}, display_type = #{displayType}, image_path = #{imagePath}, image_nm = #{imageNm}, popup_width = #{popupWidth}, popup_height = #{popupHeight}, pos_left = #{posLeft}, pos_top = #{posTop}, link_url = #{linkUrl}, new_window_yn = #{newWindowYn}, popup_template = #{popupTemplate}, close_btn_yn = #{closeBtnYn}, popup_content = #{popupContent}, all_yn = #{allYn}, hide_yn = #{hideYn} WHERE popup_seq = #{popupSeq}

UPDATE TB_POPUP_SYS_MAP SET begin_dt = #{beginDt}, end_dt = #{endDt}, begin_time = #{beginTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, use_yn = #{useYn}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE popup_sys_seq = #{popupSysSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT P.popup_seq, P.popup_title, P.popup_type, P.display_type, P.popup_width, P.popup_height, P.pos_left, P.pos_top, P.link_url, P.new_window_yn, P.popup_content, PSM.begin_dt, PSM.end_dt FROM TB_POPUP_INFO P JOIN TB_POPUP_SYS_MAP PSM ON P.popup_seq = PSM.popup_seq WHERE PSM.sys_id = #{sysId} AND PSM.use_yn = 'Y' AND P.hide_yn = 'N' AND GETDATE() BETWEEN PSM.begin_dt AND PSM.end_dt ORDER BY PSM.sort_order
